CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COIS, NINA COIS, JAMES JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS TATIANA BERGER, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE ZOJA JOCOBS REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST & ZOJA JACOBS REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AS PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT HE ENTERED INTO A CONTRACT WITH ALL DEFENDANTS. (CCP 430.10(E). SEE COMPLAINT, 54.) HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT SPECIFY WHETHER THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO ORALLY OR IN WRITING. (CCP 430.10(G). SEE OPPOSITION, P. 2:5-7.) PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION, IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE WHETHER THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO ORALLY OR IN WRITING. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. This dismissal pertains to the remaining cross complaint(s). JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Reset From Aug-28-13 To Sep-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TATIANA BERGER, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE ZOJA JOCOBS REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST & ZOJA JACOBS REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is sustained, with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege a cause of action for breach of contract as Plaintiff alleges that he entered into a contract with all Defendants. (CCP 430.10(e). See Complaint, 54.) However, Plaintiff concedes that Plaintiff did not specify whether the contract was entered into orally or in writing. (CCP 430.10(g). See Opposition, p. 2:5-7.) Plaintiff is granted leave to amend the sixth cause of action, if Plaintiff can do so in good faith, to allege whether the contract was entered into orally or in writing. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185.
